title: Dark Refined
description: Dark mode for minecraft with unique style
body:
Dark Refined

THIS RESOURCE PACK WILL NOT RECEIVE ANY MORE UPDATES

Dark mode for Minecraft GUI.

Previews

More readable settings for following languages

  • English (US)
  • English (United Kingdom)
  • Español (España)
  • Français (France)
  • Deutsch (Deutschland)
  • Polski (Polska)
  • Українська (Україна)
  • toki pona
  • Persian
  • Čeština (Česko)
  • Português (Brasil)
  • Português (Portugal)

Unique Dark Refined

You can also download Unique Dark Refined, which is essentially the same resource pack, but with unique textures for every block. There's full version available on my Buy Me a Coffee and Patreon. Also, there's a free version, which contains textures for following blocks:

  • Crafting table
  • Furnace
  • Chest
  • Enchanting table
  • Shulker box

Mod support

  • Raised

In the future updates I'm gonna add mod support for more mods. You can ask for support for mods you want in the comments section.
